name: Scrap Pistol
description: Ugly, reliable, and loud enough to start arguments on the next deck over.

name: Field Coat
description: Layered synth-leather and flak mesh.

name: Medgel Spray
description: Fast-clot foam and pain suppression.

name: Focus Shard
description: A relic conduit that amplifies cognition into weaponized anomaly.

name: Weave Wrap
description: Flex fabric for adepts and smugglers.

name: Psi-Mesh Implant
description: An embedded lattice tuned for anomaly interface.

name: Stunstick
description: A baton that ends arguments through voltage.

name: Patch Armor
description: Riveted plates over scavenged flexcloth.

name: Repair Kit
description: Sealant, fibers, patch paste, microtools.

name: Arc Tool
description: A maintenance tool that doubles as a shocking improvised weapon.

name: Salvage Rig
description: Harness and hardpoints meant for ugly work.

name: Ration Pack
description: Processed protein bricks and a flavor packet trying its best.

name: Canteen
description: Personal water reserve.

name: Water Cell
description: Sterile hydration pouch for long-haul travel.

name: Credit Chit
description: Small transferable station currency tags.

name: Field Satchel
description: A small named bag used to sort gear and loot.

name: Debt Ledger
description: A grimy slate full of names, payment schedules, and blackmail notes.

name: Reactor Bypass Key
description: An encoded bypass spike used to reach sealed ship compartments.

name: Reef Transit Idol
description: A calcified transit token coveted by Glassreef archivists.

name: Spice Brick
description: Compact ration spice from the hollow camps. Surprisingly valuable on cold stations.

name: Smuggler Satchel
description: A tagged carry satchel with hidden pockets and a burned serial strip.

name: Impound Release Key
description: A civic-issued release chip for the Scavenger's Wake. Obtained from Commander Vask or through other means.
